title: Way too many Maces
description: Ever wanted more Maces than you need?
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cdcb7b9afc131709ee1fb48b68a055a28e8f1ba_0.webp)









# WARNING⚠️:
When in Single player, relogging is required!
When in Multiplayer, Restarting the server is Required!

If you find an issue or have a suggestion, join the [Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/YjUEXtS6sH)

After version 1.15, [Minecraft Java Edition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition) version 1.21.4 and below will not be supported until further notice.

















## Summary:
Ever wanted more Maces than you need?












# Description:
well, with [Way too many Maces](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-maces) this problem will be no more. the datapack adds over 50+ new mace upgrades

and most of them can be as simple as making it that you have less gravity, up to being able to use redstone as a weapon!

Unlock all Mace Recipes:
```
/function wtm_maces:technical/triggers/atf/craft_mace
```
###### Note: you can also unlock all of the mace recipes by crafting a mace.


To /give your self a mace, you can use this command:
```
/loot give @s loot wtm_maces:items/<argument>
```
or you can also just search the mace up in the creative inventory.







# Technical:

The [Player Motion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/player_motion) datapack is embedded in version [1.3](https://modrinth.com/datapack/silvers_way-too-many-maces/version/4XbbKcsT) and higher.


## Previews:
Still not convinced this is a good datapack? well, check out the preview of every mace power and recipe!

## Notes:
Some of these maces are also suggested via our discord members, so if you wanna suggest a mace, join the [Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/YjUEXtS6sH) and once you suggest a mace, i'll see if it is worthy of a spot on here. your discord username will also be put on the mace's wiki.

</details>





## Others:
And if you want to disable the recipes, consider checking this out!\
[No WTM Maces Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wtm-maces-no-recipe)
